case_title: JOSE ARCADIO TORRES VS. HILDA G. BELTRAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,250.00 FILED BY TORRES, JOSE ARCADIO RUBEN LIMA AS TO DEFENDANT BELTRAN, HILDA G. DBA BAY AREA CARPET CARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, JOSE ARCADIO RUBEN LIMA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED MAR-26-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BELTRAN, HILDA G. DBA BAY AREA CARPET CARE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-07-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRES, JOSE ARCADIO RUBEN LIMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELTRAN, HILDA G. DBA BAY AREA CARPET CARE $1,790.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,790.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF IS OWED $2990.00 FOR WAGES; THE COURT GRANTS AN OFFSET OF $1200.00 TO DEFENDANT FOR UNPAID RENT ON THE FOOD CART BUSINESS. POSSESSION OF THE SUBJECT FOOD CART IS ORDERED TO DEFENDANT AND THE PARTIES SHALL COOPERATE IN RETURNING POSSESSION TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BELTRAN, HILDA G. DBA BAY AREA CARPET CARE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFT RE: SC-105 (REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER) ON MAY 05, 2008 BY PERSONAL SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BELTRAN, HILDA G. DBA BAY AREA CARPET CARE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.
NO PHONE NUMBERS ON RECORD, CLERK UNABLE TO CONTACT ALL PARTIES IMMEDIATELY, CERTIFICATE OF MAILING SENT.
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT. SUBMITTED TO COURT AND ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
